Uses of Enum Class
com.saperion.constants.SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE

Packages that use SaFolderConstants.FOLDER_TYPE
Package
Description
com.saperion.connector
This package contains the main classic connector classes.
com.saperion.constants
This package contains the constant definitions for the SAPERION LARIX system.
com.saperion.folder
This package contains the classes for the folder classes.
com.saperion.rmi
This package contains the classes for the LARIX RMI client wrapper components.
